task_description: Migrate MSM Supermarket customer-facing web app from Next.js to Flutter Web. Create a new Flutter project at msm_app/ with routing, API layer, state management, UI widget system, build integration, and auth bridge API route. The existing Next.js admin/API backend remains unchanged.

verification.summary: flutter analyze: 0 issues. flutter test: 1/1 passing. flutter build web --release: success. TypeScript compiles (npx tsc --noEmit --skipLibCheck). Post-review fixes applied: hybrid auth utility, JWT version checks, manifest metadata fixed.
